title: Lepanthopsis melanantha
taxonomy: Lepanthopsis melanantha is classified as a species of orchid in the genus Lepanthopsis, which belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The family Orchidaceae is one of the largest and most diverse families of flowering plants. Lepanthopsis melanantha is further classified as a member of the subfamily Epidendroideae and tribe Cranichideae. Lepanthopsis melanantha is native to Central and South America. Its classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other orchids.
